games.name: Queen Be
games.description: Live a royal life, manage your duties, and rule your kingdom with grace and rule your kingdom with grace and rule your kingdom with grace

games.name: Wood Nuts Bolts Screw
games.description: Step into the world of Wood Nuts &amp;amp; Bolts: Screw Game, where every twist and turn will put your brain to the test! This games creates your thinking world in a unique way of solving puzzles and unscrewing, screwing the nuts &amp;amp; bolts. Each level is more tricky than you experience in the previous level.
games.instructions: Tap to play

games.name: Faraday Game Casual Physics
games.description: Faraday Game is an interactive experience inspired by Faradays Law, letting players explore electromagnetic induction. Move a magnet to alter the magnetic flux in a coil, generating current to light a bulb. Test your skills, maximize light intensity, and learn about electromagnetism in a fun way! Features: Two Modes: Angular (rotate the magnet) or Linear (move it vertically). Scoring: Earn medals&amp;mdash; 24 V, 60 V, 110 V! Languages: English and Portuguese. Easter Egg: Multiple touches/keys unlock hack mode for higher voltages. Created by Prof. Dr. Rafael Jo&amp;atilde;o Ribeiro. Play now at
games.instructions: Simple Controls One button or screen taps

games.name: Sprunki Spot the 5 Differences
games.description: Sprunki Spot the 5 Differences is a fun and free online game with a delightful Sprunki twist, perfect for kids! Your mission is simple: spot 5 differences in each level to win. Featuring a playful Sprunki theme, this game guarantees endless entertainment. Stuck on a challenging level? Use Sprunki hints to uncover a difference or add extra time to stay in the game. Jump into the Sprunki fun and enjoy the adventure!
games.instructions: Mouse to play

games.name: Squid Sprunki Mingle Game 2
games.description: Squid Sprunki Mingle Game 2 is an action game. Shoot all Sprunki and Squid Game soldier around the carousel when mingle around

games.name: Bolts and Nuts in 3D!
games.description: This game is a logic puzzle. You have to unscrew the bolts from the planks! Your task is to choose the right bolt to unscrew so that you can unscrew all the planks ! Compete with friends and colleagues ! Earn points, complete levels . At first, it will be easy to complete the levels, but each new level will be more difficult than the previous one! Prove that you are a pro at logical thinking, complete all the levels! Enjoy the game !
games.instructions: The goal of the game is to unscrew the bolts from the planks Unscrew all the bolts from the planks so that they fall down Then you will pass the level

games.name: Granny Jigsaw Creepy Puzzle
games.description: Step into the eerie world of Granny Jigsaw, a spooky puzzle game for horror lovers! Solve challenging puzzles featuring dark and creepy scenes inspired by the Granny universe. Perfect for fans of scary games and brain teasers, this game will keep you engaged with its haunting atmosphere and thrilling puzzles. Can you complete them all?
games.instructions: Mouse click or tap to play

games.name: Youtuber Mcraft 2Player
games.description: You need to help the YouTuber girl and her boyfriend escape from prison. In this two-player adventure, they must collect all the YouTube plaques without getting too far apart, obtain the key and the golden plaque, and reach the chest. Open the chest and run to the door. You need to be very fast, you must escape from prison!
games.instructions: Use the WASD and Arrow keys to move Double Jump available Collect all YouTube plaques and find the key After finding the key reach the chest

games.name: My Idle Mart Empire Tycoon
games.description: Want to become the next retail tycoon in My Idle Mart Empire Tycoon? This addictive idle simulation game lets you manage your store empire. It started as a small store and gradually became a huge shopping center. Customize your store and upgrade your items. Watch as your profits grow even while youre offline. Unlock the checkout to greet customers. Move the goods quickly and put them into the belt to produce goods.
games.instructions: Mouse click or tap to play

games.name: 4inROW
games.description: 4inRow is an addictive strategy game where you match wits against an intelligent AI opponent in a race to connect four colored discs in a row - horizontally, vertically, or diagonally. In this digital version of the classic Connect Four concept, youll take turns dropping your pieces onto a 6x7 grid, while the AI strategically plans its counter-moves.
games.instructions: With mouse left or right and drop with click on left button

games.name: Merge Cubes 2048 3D
games.description: A completely new approach to the classic game 2048! Now in 3D and with dynamic physics! The cubes with numbers dont just merge - they bounce and collide, adding an element of surprise to every game! Compete with friends or colleagues!
games.instructions: 1 At first it will be easy to connect the cubes but over time there will be more and more of them Once you connect the biggest cube in this game it will disappear

games.name: Car Racing Fever
games.description: Experience the thrill of Car Racing Fever, a fast heart-pounding racing game. Control your car and battle against time and opponents on various exciting tracks! Each race challenges your driving skills as you navigate sharp turns and overtake opponents.

games.name: Fishdom Mania
games.description: In Fishdom Mania, you&amp;rsquo;ll enter a vibrant underwater world, solving various puzzle tasks. Join the adorable fish and play through exciting challenges. The core gameplay is classic number puzzles. Choose level mode or free mode, and unlock new species of fish. In level mode, draw lines to eat fish lower than you.

This game combines simulation and fishing elements. Allow you to fish, expand your pond, and grow your aquatic world.

The more bubbles left in the launcher, the richer the rewards you receive. Unlock more levels and explore the world together. Game features: 1. Enriching levels 2. Fun elimination 3. Educational Leisure

games.description: Celebrate the beauty and traditions of the Chinese New Year with Ellie in this fun and engaging game! Known as the Lunar New Year, this festival is marked by vibrant decorations, delicious food, and exciting cultural customs. Join Ellie as she prepares for the celebration by dressing up in stunning traditional outfits, decorating her space, and participating in festive activities.

Forget reruns&amp;mdash;this is your director&amp;rsquo;s cut, bringing the main character energy your tracks deserve! Why Sprunki Retake Steals the Show We didn&amp;rsquo;t just remix the formula&amp;mdash;we rewrote the script! While others stick to covers, we&amp;rsquo;re creating entire universes. Every feature is crafted to turn your beats into chart-topping stories. Headline Features The Directors Engine&amp;trade;: Exclusive to Sprunki Retake. Scene-Stealing Processing: Shine in every mix. Blockbuster Sound Design: Next-level audio. Plot-T

games.name: Chill Math Subtraction
games.description: In this game, a winter image is hidden beneath subtraction expression tiles. Players must drag and drop the correct number bauble onto the matching tiles to solve the expressions. As each expression is solved, the bird image gradually gets revealed. The goal is to uncover the entire image by completing all the math problems correctly.

games.name: nuts puzzle:color sort
games.description: Nut Puzzle: Color Sort is a color matching sorting game where you have to sort all the color bolts. Make sure each bolt contains only bolt models of the same color and advance to the next level! Don&amp;rsquo;t worry if you get stuck, you can always ask for helpful tips! Can you solve all problems? Can run in PC and mobile browsers.

games.name: Sprunki Stunt Driving Simulator
games.description: Sprunki Stunt Driving Simulator As they explore the high-speed world of racing and luxury cars, they encounter the unexpected arrival of Orange Sprunki from Incredibox Sprunki! Together, they dive into unique roleplay adventures and test their skills on challenging tracks.

games.name: Monster Demolition Giants 3d
games.description: Ready to take on giant monsters and destroy everything in sight? In Monster Demolition - Giants 3D, you&amp;rsquo;ll drive a powerful war car through a city filled with massive monsters! Destroy the monsters and experience the driving and combat thrill!

games.name: Screw Sort Pin Puzzle
games.description: Dive into the clever world of Screw Sort-Pin Puzzle, where logic and strategy come together! Your task is to sort the colorful screws, click three screws of the same color as the glass, the glass will be shot. You need to pull pins in the right order to avoid chaos!
games.instructions: Mouse click or tap to play

games.name: One Bullet To Sprunki
games.description: One Bullet To Sprunki is a thrilling bullet hell game where you tap to play, release to shoot, and annihilate the evil threatening the realm. With roguelike elements, endless gameplay, dungeon crawling, and intense shooting, this offline game challenges your reflexes and strategy. Equip powerful gear, unleash a storm of bullets, and survive the chaos! Our web dev &lt;a href='https://www.kizi10.org/'&gt;https://www.kizi10.org/&lt;/a&gt;

games.name: Dog Evolution Run
games.description: Welcome to Dog Evolution Run! This fun and exciting game uniquely combines evolution and parkour. Control a cute dog and help it evolve as it runs through an obstacle-filled path. Continue to run our cool on the platform, and collect meat to improve the level of the dog.
games.instructions: Mouse click or tap to play

games.name: Harvesting Veggies
games.description: In a fictional rural setting, players take on the role of a farmer, planting vegetables in different spots on the field and aligning them in complete rows to harvest. Once the level conditions are met, players can pass the level and unlock the next one. Different vegetables occupy varying amounts of space, and the strategic placement of vegetables in different positions during planting promotes the development of spatial, shape, and logical thinking.
games.instructions: After starting the game drag the fruit blocks to the empty spaces on the grid Completing a row or column will eliminate the blocks Each level ends when the top objectives are completed unlocking the next level

games.name: Squid Game Coloring Round
games.description: Step into the thrilling world of Squid Game with this unique coloring game! Bring iconic characters, dramatic scenes, and mysterious settings to life using your creativity and a wide palette of vibrant colors. Perfect for fans of the show, this game offers fun and relaxation while letting you relive your favorite moments. Whether youre coloring the guards, players, or the eerie arena, every page is a chance to create your own artistic twist. Ideal for casual coloring enthusiasts and die-hard fans, Squid Game Coloring delivers a captivating mix of art and fandom.
games.instructions: Mouse click or tap to play

games.name: Wordle 2.0
games.description: Wordle 2.0 is a word-based puzzle browser game that acts as an enhanced spin-off of the original NYT-Wordle game. It allows players to play in multiple languages, with word lengths from 3 to 5 letters, and with optional hints to help them make better guesses. Perfect for all players, from beginners to experts, Wordle 2.0 is going to be your ultimate challenge for vocabulary!
games.instructions: Keyboard and Touch

games.name: Minicraft Winterblock
games.description: Winter has arrived, and everything is covered in snow. In the snow-covered forest, you must be very careful to survive. You need to find two chests and collect all the snowballs. But be cautious, there are monsters everywhere waiting to eat you. You must defeat the monsters and reach the hidden portal at the end of the level. You must leave the house safely and pass through the portal.
games.instructions: Played with WASD Arrow Keys Mobile touch control is available Jump on monsters and crush them to kill them

games.name: Blast Sprunki
games.description: Hey, the cute Green Sprunki needs your help to escape from this dark world! Your mission is to guide Sprunki safely to the designated area with the least number of attempts. Strategically place explosives to propel Sprunki in the right direction, but be careful - dangerous spikes, obstacles, and tricky terrain can end your journey prematurely. Each level introduces unique challenges requiring precise timing, strategy, and creativity. Test your skills by aiming to earn three stars on every level through smart moves and minimal attempts. Can you lead Sprunki to safety and become a true master of precision?
games.instructions: Mouse click or tap to play

games.name: Celebrity Lunar New Year
games.description: Step into the star-studded glamour of &amp;lsquo;Celebrity Lunar New Year&amp;rsquo;! Explore festive ensembles, elegant accessories, and the magic of the lunar celebration. Join celebrities as they set the trend for the perfect Lunar New Year look. Elevate your style and embrace the cultural richness with the ultimate celebrity-inspired fashion. From traditional elegance to modern chic, let the stars guide you in creating a memorable and stylish Lunar New Year wardrobe. Celebrate in glamour with Celebrity Lunar New Year!
games.instructions: Left Mouse Button Click

games.name: Friday Night Sprunki
games.description: Take on the challenge of a rhythm-based rap battle against numerous famous characters, ensuring you hit the correct arrow keys in time, accompanied by music that begins with a playful and energetic vibe before transitioning into a haunting one halfway through. Complete every level to beat the other characters and reach the best score on every Friday weekend. Complete all weeks and be part of the memorable and immersive experience.
games.instructions: Easy to understand Nice and addictive gameplay Rhythm-based tap gameplay 12 Levels with different music Cute Graphics Relaxing gameplay Use the Touch or mouse to click the correct arrows and match the music

games.name: Bubble Shooter Classic Pop
games.description: Welcome to Bubble Shooter - Classic Pop, an addictive bubble-shooting game! Use your precision and quick thinking to match bubbles and clear the board. This game combines reflection and puzzle-solving, making it suitable for all ages. Drag to aim and release to shoot! Match three or more bubbles of the same color to pop them. Master the art of bouncing bubbles off walls to reach tricky spots. Every clever shot brings immense satisfaction!
games.instructions: Mouse click or tap to play

games.name: Stickman Sniper Western Gun
games.description: In Stickman Sniper: Western Gun, you become a brave Western gunslinger. Grab your gun and get ready for an exciting shooting mission! Each level will have a different scene, basketball court, street, etc. As a professional sniper, you&amp;rsquo;ll face dangerous enemies in the Wild West and use your shooting skills to take them down.
games.instructions: Mouse click or tap to play

games.name: Tiktok Gravity Knife Rush
games.description: TikTok Gravity Knife Rush is an interesting arcade game that combines parkour and shooting! In this dynamic game, you will experience the fun of extreme parkour while beginning nervous battles with enemies. When selecting the shooting mode, shoot the digital post and collect the knife. Beware of spinning mace, stick, etc. In Parkour mode, collect as many knives as possible, choose the right digital gate, dodge bombs, hammers, etc.

games.name: Sprunki Castle Panic Skibidi Toilet
games.description: Now Sprunki Castle Panic Skibidi Toilet must escape from Skibidi Toilet in Castle Incredibox. Get all coin to get access to exit. Now there is no easy escape, beware!

games.name: Bestie Breakup Run Christmas Love
games.description: Bestie Breakup Run-Christmas Love is a fun running game with a Christmas atmosphere and a romantic plot. Join the loving hero as they sprint through a snowy Christmas landscape, avoid obstacles, and defeat all challenges that stand in the way of progress.
games.instructions: Mouse click or tap to play

games.name: RollMaze
games.description: Challenge your mind with Roll Maze, the addictive physics-based puzzle game that puts your spatial reasoning and timing skills to the ultimate test! Guide multiple balls through intricate mazes by rotating the entire playfield with precise mouse controls. Race against time to earn all three stars while our charming hero characters cheer you on from the background! Master increasingly complex levels Collect stars and achieve perfect scores Test your reflexes and strategic thinking Simple yet challenging mouse controls Endless gameplay with unlimited levels
games.instructions: Hold left on mouse and swipe left or right to turn maze

games.name: Bird Sort Puzzles
games.description: Bird Sort Puzzles is a fun and challenging game where players sort colorful birds into matching nests. With various bird colors and nest combinations, players must think strategically to complete each level. You can add more branches in difficult levels. The game offers a relaxing yet stimulating experience, perfect for players of all ages.
games.instructions: Mouse click or tap to play

games.name: EndlessBall
games.description: Endless Ball looks deceivingly simple at first glance &amp;ndash; just keep the ball bouncing and rack up those points. But dont let its minimalist design fool you! This addictively challenging game has turned even the most confident players into humble beginners. While 99% of players think theyll master it in minutes, only 2% have ever scored higher than 20 points! The rules are straightforward: tap to keep the ball in motion, avoid obstacles, and survive as long as you can. Yet, this seemingly basic gameplay transforms into an intense test of reflexes, timing, and concentration.
games.instructions: Mouse click or tap to play

games.name: Help Her Escape
games.description: Each level unveils gripping twists and compelling backstory elements, immersing players in a heart-pounding race against time. With beautifully designed environments and a suspenseful narrative, Help Her Escape captivates players, urging them to think creatively and act decisively. Will you have what it takes to outsmart the traps and lead her to safety? Dive in and put your skills to the test!
games.instructions: Mouse click or tap to play

games.name: Paint Tiles Puzzle
games.description: Welcome to Paint Tiles Puzzle, where creativity meets logic in a colorful puzzle adventure! This is a relaxing puzzle game that combines drawing and puzzle-solving elements. Each level presents a tile grid and your task is to fill the empty spaces with the right colors. Tap the brush to paint the same colors. Each level features different patterns and color combinations, testing both your artistic skills and logical thinking. As you advance, the puzzles become more complex, keeping you engaged and challenged.
games.instructions: Mouse click or tap to play

games.name: Sprunki Whack A Mole
games.description: This is a fun and exciting game for you, your friends, and your family! Get ready to test your reflexes and have a blast as your objective is to hit all the popping monsters to score as many points as you can. The more you hit, the higher your score climbs! If you enjoy games like Whack A Mole, then you&amp;rsquo;ll absolutely love this action-packed adventure. And here&amp;rsquo;s a festive twist &amp;ndash; Sprunki might make a surprise appearance, so keep your eyes peeled! Challenge your loved ones and see who can top the leaderboard in this holiday-themed fun!
games.instructions: Mouse click or tap to play

games.name: Newborn Unicorn Daycare
games.description: This is a caring unicorn game for girls. We have a lot of fun activities in this educational game.It is tailor-made for those who like to play with unicorns. You have to take care of the health of the pregnant mum, help her with her daily activities, and become her obstetrician. After the baby unicorn is successfully born, you need to bathe it and give it a check-up.
games.instructions: Mouse click or tap to play

games.name: CandyCrushPuzzle
games.description: Candy element elimination, exchange candy positions, horizontal or vertical more than three candies will be eliminated, more than three identical candies will generate a new special candy. The game has multiple levels, come and experience it.

games.name: Sword And Spin
games.description: In Sword and Spin, you&amp;rsquo;re a brave warrior with a sword, racing through challenging arcade levels filled with obstacles and enemies. Use your sword to cut through everything in your path! Spin around with your greatsword.

games.name: Hunt And Seek
games.description: Ready for a challenge of intellect and strategy? In Hunt And Seek, enter an adventure world filled with puzzles that will stimulate your brain as you search for hidden characters! This game offers endless fun and challenges, suitable for boys and puzzle enthusiasts! At the beginning of each level, an arrester is randomly selected. At the beginning of each level, a random arrester is selected to become a giant and start hunting.

games.name: Baby Fantastic Rescue Team
games.description: This is a game for girls about earthquake safety. The game atmosphere has three parts, earthquake, fire, and rescue characters. When an earthquake happens, you must prepare rescue ropes, chainsaws, shovels, crowbars, and other items.

games.name: Knife and Hit
games.description: Master the art of knife throwing in this addictive arcade game! Challenge yourself in this thrilling knife-throwing adventure where precision meets excitement. Aim, throw, and stick your knives into the rotating wooden target with perfect timing. Can you land 10 knives side by side without failing? Level up through increasingly challenging stages, each featuring unique rotating patterns and obstacles. Collect golden apples for bonus points, unlock an impressive arsenal of razor-sharp knives, and face epic boss battles every 5 levels. Perfect your timing, develop lightning-fast reflexes, and become the ultimate knife-throwing master!
games.instructions: Mouse click or tap to play
